content:
1. Validates order (IDs, items, stock, qty>0), computes subtotal+tax+shipping (w/ per-item discounts), inserts order, decrements stock, sends SMTP confirmation. Exists as the core end-to-end order handler.
2. Non-atomic side effects (DB writes then email); no transactions/rollback; stock races; assumes many config keys exist; naive datetime compare.
3. Unknown — would need to ask the author.
4. Email or later DB failures after partial commit; concurrent stock/orders; missing customer; timezone/datetime issues; bad SMTP creds; duplicate SKUs; discount edge dates.
